feedback.technicalIssues: The games were slow to load and it was hard to read/see the directions of the games (action keys).
feedback.confusingParts: It was hard to see the keys to press for some of the games. They were on the side and they were being blocked by the game screen.
feedback.suggestions: Make it easier to read the directions of each game, have all of the directions for each game at the start in the center, don't place them on the side.
feedback.funCriteria: If it had reminded me of a game that I once played in the past, also if the game was too hard I didn't find it fun because it was too challenging.
